items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not explicitly confirm the outcome of the persona scenario regarding 'Channel preference per event type'. While the exploratory step outlines the expectation for a deterministic validation, there are no concrete traces or snapshots captured to support the validation of the scenario behavior. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement satisfaction.
